description_long: This is a cylindrical bottle of lotion with a tall, slim profile and a white cap. The front label displays the brand 'Complete Hemp' and the product name 'Collagen Booster Serum CBD' in bold, clear text, surrounded by a subtle, intricate line pattern. The bottle is primarily white with light gray decorative elements and detailed product information wrapping around the sides and back. The cap appears to be a smooth, opaque plastic, and the bottle itself is likely made of lightweight plastic as well. The back and sides feature dense text, barcodes, and a QR code, indicating regulatory and product details. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on clarity and subtle decorative accents.
description: A tall, slim white lotion bottle with a smooth cap, intricate line patterns, and clear branding on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Complete Hemp' branding, 'Collagen Booster Serum CBD' product name, and decorative line pattern.
description_view_1: Back view with dense product information text, barcodes, and regulatory symbols, minimal decorative elements.
description_view_2: Rear side view dominated by text and a QR code, with the decorative pattern continuing around the bottle.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the transition between the front label and the dense text on the back, with the QR code partially visible.
